data.body: Kickoff: worktree ~/impl-bbf1-vendor-adapter-p2 branch impl-bbf1-vendor-adapter-p2 @ origin/main ed7bc9ad3. Landing: rebar/Gerrit default (push gerrit HEAD:refs/for/main; LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1; commit-msg hook installed). Identity RebarBotNava <joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com>. Epic bbf1 already in_progress; all 7 tickets hold certified plan-review PASS. Tree: 6 open code leaves. Order: 97f2, aff0, 21ca, 625b, eefd independent; ad44 depends_on 625b (land 625b first). 4af8/6673/94f9/ce4d/dfb9/ef33 already closed. Follow-up 556a OUT of scope.
